description_long: This is an upright piano with a polished, dark reddish-brown wooden exterior and a classic, elegant design. The front features a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and three gold-colored pedals at the base. The upper front panel has a decorative carved wooden element, while the lower section is open, revealing the pedal mechanism. The sides and back are smooth and finished in the same wood grain, with the back panel being completely flat and unadorned. The piano's surface is glossy, reflecting light and highlighting the wood's rich texture. No visible brand or logo is present, and the lid is fully closed, concealing the internal strings and hammers.
description: A polished upright piano with a dark reddish-brown wood finish, full keyboard, and three gold pedals. The design is classic and elegant, with a glossy surface and decorative front panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three gold pedals, and decorative upper panel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the piano's depth, curved leg, and the closed lid.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the piano's profile, curved leg, and the closed lid.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full-size keyboard with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys in a traditional arrangement.
